manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are playing a collaborative word guessing game in which you have to describe a target word for another player to guess.

Rules:
(a) You have to reply in the form: CLUE: <some text>. Guesses from the other player will start with GUESS.
(b) You cannot use the target word itself, parts or morphological variants of it in your description.
(c) In addition, the same rules apply for related words which are provided below.

End conditions:
(i) If you use the target word or a related word in your description, then you lose.
(ii) If the other player can guess the target word in 3 tries, you both win.

Let us start.

This is the target word that you need to describe and that the other player needs to guess:

phantom

Related words are:

- unreal
- ghost
- apparition

Important: You are under time pressure, give short descriptions that are to the point!

content.thinking:
I need to describe "phantom" without using:
- phantom (the target word)
- unreal
- ghost
- apparition

Let me think of a short, clear clue. A phantom is like a spirit or specter, something that appears but isn't really there. I could reference:
- The Phantom of the Opera
- Something invisible or illusory
- A spectral presence
- Something haunting

Let me give a concise clue:

"CLUE: A spectral presence that haunts; also famous in an opera"

Wait, let me make it even shorter and clearer:

"CLUE: Spectral spirit that haunts places; famous one lives in an opera house"

Or simpler:
"CLUE: Invisible haunting spirit; famous one from the opera"

content.text: CLUE: Spectral being that haunts; think of the famous one from the opera house

clem_player.response: CLUE: Spectral being that haunts; think of the famous one from the opera house

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are playing a collaborative word guessing game in which you have to guess a target word that another player describes to you.

You can make one guess at each trial. You win when you guess the target word. You lose when you cannot guess it in 3 tries.

After each trial you will get a new hint from the other player which starts with CLUE.

Make your guesses by just saying the word using the following form: GUESS: <a word>

Let us start.


CLUE: Spectral being that haunts; think of the famous one from the opera house

content.thinking:
The clue mentions "Spectral being that haunts" and specifically references "the famous one from the opera house." This is clearly referring to "The Phantom of the Opera." The word they're looking for is most likely "PHANTOM" or "GHOST."

Given the reference to "the opera house," this is almost certainly referring to "The Phantom of the Opera," so the target word is likely "PHANTOM."

Let me make my first guess: PHANTOM
